caption: A man wearing a white baseball cap, black headphones, and a black hoodie with "BOSS TALK" written in gold and white letters sits in a studio. He is positioned behind a desk with a professional microphone on a boom arm in front of him. Behind him is a white wall featuring several logos with the word "HUSTLE" under five stars and a blue sign that reads "Where BOSSES Talk!". On the desk, there is a black container with red text that says "BOSS TALK OUT LOUD". In the bottom left corner, a small circular logo includes the text "BOSS TALK". As the sequence progresses, the man shifts his gaze and facial expression, moving from a contemplative look to speaking, with his mouth opening and his head turning slightly to the right.
